zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Longford III於1351年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德時，他的父親Nicholas de Longford II27歲，母親Alice D. Eyncourt33歲。他於1372年之前與Margery Sulney結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1401年8月31日在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Longford III于1351年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德时，他的父亲Nicholas de Longford II27岁，母亲Alice D. Eyncourt33岁。他于1372年之前与Margery Sulney结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1401年8月31日在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Langford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Longford III was born in 1351, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Longford II, was 27 and his mother, Alice D. Eyncourt, was 33. He married Margery Sulney before 1372. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 31 August 1401, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Longford III est né en 1351, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Longford II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice D. Eyncourt, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margery Sulney avant 1372. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 août 1401, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Longford III 1351 in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Longford II 27 und seine Mutter Alice D. Eyncourt 33. Er hat vor 1372 Margery Sulney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 31. August 1401 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Longford III è nato il nel 1351 nel Longford, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de Longford II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice D. Eyncourt, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margery Sulney prima del 1372. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 agosto 1401, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Longford, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Longford IIIが1351年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Longford IIは27歳，母Alice D. Eyncourtは33歳であった。1372年以前にMargery Sulneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1401年8月31日に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Longford III(이)가 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Longford II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice D. Eyncourt(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1372년 이전 Margery Sulney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1401년 8월 31일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Longford III nasceu em 1351, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Longford II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice D. Eyncourt, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Sulney antes 1372. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1401, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Longford III родился в 1351 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Longford II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice D. Eyncourt, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Sulney перед 1372 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 31 августа 1401 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

Eyncourt, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margery Sulney antes de 1372. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1401, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
